Aria II Quick Reference Guide 

Start Up 

Area Prep 

 Bio Bubble  

Clean instrument 

 Get tubes ready 

Bleach 

Water 

Nozzle 

Turn on cytometer 

 Log in  

 Power on Aria 

 Check for air bubble and release if needed 

Stream  

 Clean sorting chamber 

Nozzle holder 

Flow cell area 

Plates 

 Nozzle 

Sonicate  

Make sure software is in correct configuration 

Place prepped nozzle in flow cell 

 Turn on stream 

Check stream position in waste drawer 

Focus stream light 

QC Beads 

Prep for Beads 

 Clean Flow Cell 

Bleach 

Ideally 20-30 min 

Flow Rate = 11 

Water 

Ideally 20-30 min 

Flow Rate = 11 

 Set Sweet Spot 

Adjust amplitude 

4.5 < amplitude value < 22.0 

Droplet and satellite come back together by bottom line 

If values are outside: 

Sonicate nozzle and try again 

If issue is still present, will need to change frequency Grab Dr. Fan for this 

Set gap number to match current value 

Change Drop 1 to match value 

Set Sweet Spot On 

CST Beads 

 Load CST Beads 

Use QC template 

Flow Rate = 1.0 

 Run Beads 

Change window extension to 0, change back to 2 and record 

 Unload Beads 

Accudrop Beads 

 Load Beads 

Make sure event rate is above 800 

Flow rate should not be above 2.0 

 Prep to Run Auto Delay 

Open sorting layout 

Precision is set to “Fine Tune” 

Start sort 

Set side streams-Varies for nozzle  

100um 

Inner left side stream is set to ~ 11 

All other side streams at 0 

85um 

Inner left side stream is set to ~ 21 

All other side streams at 0 

Turn on Optical Filter 

Adjust inner left side stream 

Values add up to 100.0 (doesn’t always do it for 85um) 

Run Auto Delay 

Make sure displayed figure looks normal 

Set Side Streams for Sort 

 Pick the tube holder 

 Run Test Sort 

 Adjust all streams, as needed 

5 mL Tube Holder 

Inner tubes just left of center 

Outer tubes just right of center 

15 mL Tube Holder just left of center 

 Wash cytometer 

Bleach 

Water 

Experiment Template Prep (can be done at any time) 

Importing from Previous Run 

 Import most recent experiment w/ same panel 

 Duplicate without data 

 Change dates as necessary 

New Panel 

 Import most recent experiment user ran 

 Add Correct Detectors 

Parameters Tab 

Add and remove Detectors 

Leave one open detector 

Change Detector Labels 

Experiment Layout 

Label with marker and fluorochrome  

 Remove any Compensation 

 Set Up Compensation Matrix (if needed) 

Shortest à Longest λ 

Do not include live/dead (or put it at the end)  

 Readjust Gating Plots 

Delete any unnecessary gates 

Make sure plots are displaying correct populations 

 Delete all but 1 tube 

Running Sort 

Gate Set-Up 

 Set Voltages 

Use an all-color sample 

Make sure all plots are not on biexponential  

Alter Values 

Adjust area scaling 

Adjust scatters 

Fine-tune area scaling 

Adjust color voltages 

Record ~ 5k events 

 Compensation (if needed) 

Manual Compensation 

Convert scale on matrix plots to biexponential 

Run and record all single colors 

~1k events for beads 

May need to adjust scatter values 

~5k events for cells 

Adjust Compensation 

Change scatters gate 

Shrink to population of interest 

Color by color 

Copy spectral overlap 

Paste spectral overlap w/ zeroes on next tube 

Check Compensation 

Use compensation matrix 

Adjust values as necessary 

Paste final compensation to each tube 

Check all single colors again 

Paste acceptable compensation 

Already recorded sample tubes 

Global settings 

 Gates 

Adjust pre-drawn gates as needed 

If new gate is needed: 

Click on correct parent gate in population hierarchy 

Draw gate on correct plot 

 Run Additional Controls (if needed) 

 Clarify Sorting Needs 

Determine populations to sort 

Determine cell numbers needed 

Min/Max 

Timing for samples 

 Set Up Sorting Layout 

Device Type 

Sorting 

 

Post Sorting 

 Run Purity check, if needed 

Make sure to wash with water for at least 1 min prior to running 

Record ~ 2k events 

 Export 

Experiment 

Figures 

FCS Copy 

Sort Reports 

 Clean Instrument 

Bleach 

Water 

 Admin Tasks 

Upload data to SharePoint 

Update sorting time on iLabs add  

Add “set up charge”  

Save and confirm booking 

Delete experiment from FACSDiva once a&b are completed 

Daily Shutdown 

Wash Cytometer 

 Bleach (~10 min) 

 Water (~5 min) 

Turn Off Stream 

Clean Flow Cell 

 Remove nozzle 

Use Contrad as “cleaning agent” 

Empty Waste 

Turn off Aria 

 Software 

 Cytometer 

 Computer 

 bioBubble
